name: Deluxe Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 5 packages Cream cheese; soft, 8 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry dough: In a large bowl with mixer on low speed, beat flour, softened butter, sugar, egg yolk, and grated lemon peel until well combined. Shape the dough into a ball, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Press about 1/3 of the dough onto the bottom of a 10-inch x 2-1/2-inch springform pan; reserve remaining dough in refrigerator.
3. Bake crust for 8 minutes or until golden, then cool on a wire rack. Turn oven control to 475°F (245°C).
4. While the crust is cooling, prepare the filling: In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat cream cheese until smooth. Slowly add sugar, scraping the bowl frequently with a rubber spatula. Add eggs, milk, flour, egg yolks, and grated lemon peel; beat for 5 minutes, occasionally scraping the bowl.
5. Press remaining dough around the sides of the pan, leaving about 1-inch from the top. Pour the cream cheese mixture into the crust.
6. Bake cheesecake for 12 minutes. Turn oven control to 300°F (150°C) and bake for an additional 35 minutes. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake remain in the oven for 30 minutes.
7. Remove cheesecake from the oven and cool completely on a wire rack. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours or until well chilled.
8. When the cheesecake is firm, loosen the pan's sides with a spatula; carefully remove the loosened cake from the pan bottom and slide it onto a serving plate.
